description_long: This is a modern, streamlined scooter with a beige body and black seat, designed for urban commuting. The scooter features a rounded front with a circular headlight, two rearview mirrors, and a prominent black footrest area. The wheels are solid and black, with visible disc brakes on the front wheel. The rear section includes a red taillight, a license plate holder, and a visible exhaust system. The handlebars are equipped with chrome-finished mirrors and controls, and the overall build suggests a sturdy metal frame with plastic fairings. The seat is contoured for comfort, and the scooter stands on a side kickstand.
description: A beige, modern scooter with a black seat, rounded headlight, chrome mirrors, and solid black wheels, designed for city travel. Features include a contoured seat, visible exhaust, and a sturdy frame.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the scooter, black seat, exhaust, and rear taillight.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular headlight, two chrome mirrors, and the narrow front wheel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the kickstand, black seat, and engine cover.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the taillight, license plate holder, and the back of the seat.
attribute_deck_design: medium-width, flat, black footrest area with subtle grip texture
